name: Maas Group Holdings Limited
analysis: MGH has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$5.0715. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
